nasb.text: Therefore I have hewn them in pieces by the prophets; I have slain them by the words of My mouth; And the judgments on you are like the light that goes forth.

esv.text: Therefore I have hewn them by the prophets; I have slain them by the words of my mouth, and my judgment goes forth as the light.

cnv.text: 因此，我藉眾先知砍碎他們， 用我口中的話殺戮他們； 我的審判必如光一般發出。

ccb.text: 所以，我差遣先知用我的话杀戮你们， 我的审判必如闪电临到你们。
